tasks.subject: Task 1: BackingAdapter interface + JSONAdapter refactor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract Ontology.load() fetch-and-cache logic into BackingAdapter interface with JSONAdapter implementation. Behavior-preserving refactor.

**Files:**
- Create: ontology/core/BackingAdapter.js
- Create: ontology/core/JSONAdapter.js
- Modify: ontology/core/Ontology.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ontology.objectTypes.get('Flight').adapter === 'json' (defaulting)
- All existing UI flows preserved
- [adapter:json] loaded log lines
- Cache size matches total rows

**Verify:** Open ontology/index.html → all flows work. Console: Array.from(ontology.objectTypes.entries()).map(([n, c]) => [n, c.adapter]) returns json triples.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/core/BackingAdapter.js", "ontology/core/JSONAdapter.js", "ontology/core/Ontology.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual: open ontology/index.html, run console assertions", "acceptanceCriteria": ["adapter field defaults to 'json'", "all existing flows preserved", "[adapter:json] loaded log lines", "cache.size matches total rows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Synthetic data generator + new dataset
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate deterministic ~5000 Flight / 200 Pilot / 100 Airport dataset as JSON and Parquet via Node duckdb binding.

**Files:**
- Create: package.json, .gitignore, tools/generate-data.mjs, tools/README.md
- Create: ontology/data/flights.parquet
- Modify: ontology/data/{airports,pilots,flights}.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm install + npm run gen-data succeed
- Re-run produces byte-identical output (deterministic)
- Status mix ~60/15/20/5
- Zero orphan FKs
- Pilot tiers each ≥ 20
- node_modules/ git-ignored

**Verify:** node -e validation script.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", ".gitignore", "tools/generate-data.mjs", "tools/README.md", "ontology/data/airports.json", "ontology/data/pilots.json", "ontology/data/flights.json", "ontology/data/flights.parquet"], "verifyCommand": "npm install && npm run gen-data && node -e validation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deterministic output", "5000/200/100 row counts", "status distribution within target", "zero orphan FKs", "all three pilot tiers populated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: DuckDBProvider singleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Singleton owning DuckDB-Wasm instance. init() (idempotent, parallel-safe), registerParquet(name, url), query(sql, params).

**Files:**
- Create: ontology/core/DuckDBProvider.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- DuckDBProvider.shared() singleton
- Idempotent init()
- registerParquet creates queryable VIEW
- query() returns plain rows; bigint coerced to number
- Parameterized queries via prepared statements

**Verify:** Browser console import + init + query (must serve via http://).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/core/DuckDBProvider.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual: serve via http and run console import + init + query", "acceptanceCriteria": ["singleton dedup", "idempotent init", "parquet registration", "parameterized query path", "BigInt -> Number coercion"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: DuckDBAdapter + wire Flight via manifests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DuckDBAdapter using DuckDBProvider; Flight wired in staging/prod manifests; dev keeps JSON; fallback on init failure.

**Files:**
- Create: ontology/core/DuckDBAdapter.js
- Modify: Ontology.js, env/{dev,staging,prod}/manifest.json, app.js, ConfigProvider.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ?env=staging: [duckdb] ready + [adapter:duckdb] loaded Flight (5000)
- adapter resolves correctly per env
- ontology.cache.size === 5300
- All existing flows work with DuckDB-backed Flight
- Broken CDN URL → fallback to JSON, app still boots

**Verify:** Browser load each env; simulate broken CDN.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/core/DuckDBAdapter.js", "ontology/core/Ontology.js", "ontology/env/dev/manifest.json", "ontology/env/staging/manifest.json", "ontology/env/prod/manifest.json", "ontology/app.js", "ontology/config/ConfigProvider.js"], "verifyCommand": "serve and load ?env=staging, ?env=dev, simulate CDN failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["adapter selection per manifest", "DuckDB hydration of Flight", "fallback to JSON on init failure", "all existing UI flows preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: QueryBuilder.sql() escape hatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** .sql(text, params) on QueryBuilder. Returns ObjectProxy[] via Ontology.get(type, pk) so security/temporal/proxy filtering applies.

**Files:**
- Modify: ontology/core/QueryBuilder.js (add .sql, async collect/count)
- Modify: Agent.js, app.js (await callsites)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .sql() returns proxies
- Without .from() → throws clear error
- Kinetic edits applied post-SQL
- viewer role + temporal filter both apply

**Verify:** Browser console SQL queries with role/temporal toggles.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/core/QueryBuilder.js", "ontology/core/Agent.js", "ontology/app.js"], "verifyCommand": "console SQL query with role/temporal toggles", "acceptanceCriteria": [".sql() returns proxies", "kinetic overlay applied", "security filter applied", "temporal filter applied", "param binding required"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Generalized detail panel + state.selection refactor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Detail panel for Pilot/Airport selection; state.selectedFlightId → state.selection: { type, id }.

**Files:**
- Modify: ontology/app.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- state.selection replaces selectedFlightId
- Flight detail unchanged
- Pilot detail: state, computed, linked flights
- Airport detail: state, departures, arrivals
- No actions for non-Flight types
- Time travel + role switching still affect detail panel

**Verify:** Click flight, then console-set selection to Pilot/Airport.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/app.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual: click flight, then console-set selection to Pilot and Airport", "acceptanceCriteria": ["state.selection object shape", "Flight render unchanged", "Pilot/Airport renderers", "no actions for non-Flight types"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: GraphView module (built but not yet mounted)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** views/GraphView.js owning force-graph instance, ontology→{nodes, links}, click→select bridge.

**Files:**
- Create: ontology/views/GraphView.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Constructor: (canvasEl, ontology, { onSelect, getContext })
- mount() subscribes to loaded/action/undo
- refresh() produces ~5300 nodes / ~15k links
- Type:pk node ids
- Forward link types only
- Click → onSelect with {type, id}

**Verify:** Console temp-mount in floating div.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/views/GraphView.js"], "verifyCommand": "console: import GraphView, mount in floating div, observe nodes and click bridge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["constructor signature", "mount/refresh/refreshLight", "forward links only", "click → onSelect with {type, id}", "color by status for Flight, by type for Pilot/Airport"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Layout refactor + app.js wiring + remove flight list
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace flight-list panel with graph canvas; mount GraphView; delete renderFlightList.

**Files:**
- Modify: ontology/index.html, styles.css, app.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Layout: graph(60%) | detail | audit-log(320px)
- Click node → detail panel populates
- renderFlightList/.panel-list/#flight-list all removed
- Render < 5s, interactive
- cancelFlight re-colors without full layout rebuild
- Branching, time travel, viewer role, integrity, AIP, multi-tab CRDT all work

**Verify:** ?env=staging end-to-end UI walkthrough (10 sub-checks).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/index.html", "ontology/styles.css", "ontology/app.js"], "verifyCommand": "?env=staging full UI walkthrough", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new 3-column layout", "graph mounts and renders", "click selection drives detail panel", "flight list code removed", "all existing flows preserved including branching, time travel, viewer role, integrity worker, AIP, multi-tab CRDT"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Final verification sweep + footer docs update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk both spec verification checklists end-to-end; add Adapter, OLAP escape hatch, and Graph view bullets to footer.

**Files:**
- Modify: ontology/index.html (footer arch list)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All Phase A items pass on staging and dev
- All Phase B items pass on staging
- Footer has 3 new/updated bullets
- No console errors on clean reload

**Verify:** Walk every spec §6 checkbox.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ontology/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "walk full spec §6 verification checklists Phase A and Phase B", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all spec §6 items pass on staging and dev", "footer documentation updated", "no console errors"]}
```
